name: Tampa Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Tampa Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop specializing in jewelry buying, selling, trading, and collateral-based loans with in-house repair and custom design services.
description_long:
Tampa Jewelry & Loan operates as a full-service pawn shop and jewelry retailer in Tampa, Florida. The company positions itself as the area's #1 pawn shop with a stated focus on quality products and customer service. Their business model combines traditional pawn lending (accepting jewelry and valuables as collateral) with retail jewelry sales and specialized repair services.

The company offers a comprehensive range of services across multiple dimensions: pawn loans secured by jewelry and other valuables, buying and selling of pre-owned jewelry, jewelry trading, custom jewelry creation, watch repair and servicing (including Swiss timepieces), jewelry cleaning, and battery replacements. Their website indicates they source inventory globally and claim to pass wholesale savings to customers. The staff is positioned as knowledgeable in both general jewelry services and specialized timepiece maintenance.

What distinguishes Tampa Jewelry & Loan from typical pawn shops is their emphasis on jewelry expertise, custom design capabilities, and high-end watch servicing. Customer reviews highlight exceptional packaging for shipped items (padded wrapping, UPS 2-day insured delivery), responsive communication with photos upon request, and notably fast service turnaround. One recent review specifically praised watch band customization work and diamond setting quality. The company maintains a 4.8-star rating across 250 Google reviews, with positive feedback concentrated on affordability, quality of work, and transaction reliability.

As a pawn shop, the core function remains collateral-based lending against jewelry and other assets—a high-interest lending model typical of the pawn industry. While the website emphasizes quality and customer service, no specific loan terms, interest rates, or fees are disclosed. The business model depends on reselling pawned items at markup and lending at rates that may be significantly higher than traditional personal loans, making this suitable primarily for consumers needing immediate liquidity against assets rather than those seeking favorable borrowing terms.
address: 2302 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33607

company_info.headquarters: 2302 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33607

pros: High customer satisfaction: 4.8-star rating across 250 Google reviews with recent positive feedback
Global sourcing for inventory with claimed wholesale pricing passed to customers
Comprehensive jewelry expertise including custom design and Swiss timepiece servicing
Fast, professional shipping with full insurance, tracking, and signature required
Responsive customer service (additional photos provided upon request per reviews)
Full-service repair capabilities: cleaning, battery replacement, stone setting, upgrades
Quick turnaround times documented in customer reviews
cons: No loan terms, interest rates, APR, or fee structure disclosed on website
Pawn lending model means rates are typically much higher than personal loans or credit lines
Limited information about loan approval criteria or collateral valuation processes
No mention of online application or remote loan process; appears location-dependent
Risk of losing collateral if unable to repay within pawn shop terms (standard pawn shop limitation)
best_for: Jewelry enthusiasts needing custom design or high-end watch repair in Tampa area
Consumers with valuable jewelry needing immediate cash who can afford pawn lending rates
Sellers of pre-owned jewelry or watches seeking retail or consignment options
Those seeking luxury jewelry at discounted prices through pawn shop inventory
diagnosis: Tampa Jewelry & Loan is best suited for Tampa-area consumers with valuable jewelry who need emergency cash and are willing to accept pawn lending rates, as well as jewelry enthusiasts seeking retail, custom design, or specialized watch repair services. The primary caveat is that pawn lending carries substantially higher interest rates than alternatives like personal loans, making it a last-resort borrowing option rather than a primary financing source.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based lending against jewelry and valuables)
